summary: Iteration 29 - Catalog Foundation System testing complete. All 22 tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/catalog/categories returns 5 categories with correct procedure counts (fiscale=7, previdenziale=2, societario=1, documentale=7, informativo=3, total=20). (2) Category is_official flags correct (fiscale/previdenziale/societario=true, documentale/informativo=false). (3) VAT_OPEN_PF enriched fields verified: category=fiscale, procedure_type=official_procedure, official_action with code/label/entity_name/form_reference, who_acts with herion_prepares=true/user_submits=true/delegation_possible=false, auth_method=SPID, proof_expected with type=protocol_number/timing=immediate/optional=false, estimated_duration with label/min_days/max_days, document_specs with 2 items. (4) STATUS_UPDATE: category=informativo, procedure_type=internal_support, official_action/auth_method/proof_expected all None. (5) COMPANY_CLOSURE: category=societario, procedure_type=official_procedure, delegation_required=true, 5 document_specs with why_needed, proof_expected timing=delayed. (6) VAT_DECLARATION: who_acts has user_signs=true, delegation_possible=true. (7) GET /api/catalog returns all 20 entries.
critical_code_review_comments: CATALOG_CATEGORIES dict correctly defines 5 categories with id, label, description, icon, is_official fields
GET /api/catalog/categories endpoint dynamically counts procedures via db.practice_catalog.count_documents({category: cat_id})
Catalog seed data includes 20 entries with full enrichment: 7 fiscale, 2 previdenziale, 1 societario, 7 documentale, 3 informativo
All official_procedure entries have complete official_action, who_acts, auth_method, proof_expected, estimated_duration, document_specs
All internal_support entries correctly have official_action=None, auth_method=None, proof_expected=None
document_specs include why_needed field explaining the purpose of each required document
seed_data_creation: Used existing catalog seed data (20 entries seeded on startup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 tested the catalog foundation system. All 22 tests passed. Key verified features: (1) GET /api/catalog/categories returns 5 categories with procedure_count (fiscale=7, previdenziale=2, societario=1, documentale=7, informativo=3). (2) Categories have is_official flag (fiscale/previdenziale/societario=true, documentale/informativo=false). (3) Enriched catalog entries have: category, procedure_type (official_procedure vs internal_support), official_action (code, label, entity_name, form_reference), who_acts (herion_prepares, herion_submits, user_submits, user_signs, delegation_possible, entity_response_expected), auth_method (SPID or None), proof_expected (type, timing, label, optional), estimated_duration (label, min_days, max_days), document_specs (key, name, why_needed, format, mandatory). (4) Internal support procedures (STATUS_UPDATE etc) have official_action=None, auth_method=None, proof_expected=None. (5) COMPANY_CLOSURE has delegation_required=true and 5 document_specs with why_needed. (6) VAT_DECLARATION has user_signs=true and delegation_possible=true.
